rows.content: During the developmental stage, the appearance and content of a
panel frequently change. After changing a panel definition, it is
desirable to quickly display it to verify that the change has had
the desired effect. To display a panel directly, select Dialog
PANEL+- Specifies the ID of the panel to be displayed.
MESSAGE+- Specifies the message ID of a message to be displayed with
CURSOR+- Specifies the name of the field in which the cursor is to be
placed when the panel is displayed. If not specified, the                                       el
cursor is placed in the first input field.
CURSOR POSITION+- Specifies the cursor position within the current
field. If not specified, one is assumed.
